features.name: parameterized class localparam type in struct packed
features.description: Code should include a parameterized class with localparam type that is used in a packed struct definition within the class
features.snippet: class pipeline_class #(parameter int XLEN = 32, localparam type XWORD = logic [XLEN-1:0]); typedef struct packed {XWORD pc;} if_id_t; endclass

features.name: class scope resolution as module type parameter
features.description: Code should include a class typedef accessed via scope resolution operator used as a module type parameter instantiation

features.name: module type parameter with struct default
features.description: Code should include a module with a type parameter that uses a struct type, instantiated with a class typedef
features.snippet: module pipe_reg #(parameter type T = logic, parameter T CLR_VAL = 1'b0) (input logic clk, input T din, output T dout); endmodule
